title: Capture EXPLAIN output and summarize the bottleneck
description: Run EXPLAIN/EXPLAIN ANALYZE on a target query and report the costliest node, row mis-estimates, and index usage.
body: Use when a query is reported slow or before adding an index. Actions: run the dialect's plan command (Postgres EXPLAIN (ANALYZE, BUFFERS), MySQL EXPLAIN ANALYZE / FORMAT=JSON) against representative parameters, then report the top node by time, the estimate-vs-actual row counts, whether indexes are used or it falls back to a full scan, and any sort/hash spill to disk. Do not run EXPLAIN ANALYZE on a mutating statement in production (it executes the query). This skill exposes capability only and must not run against production without runtime permission. Validation signals include a plan node clearly dominating time and a concrete index/rewrite hypothesis. Risk boundary: ANALYZE actually executes the statement; for INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE use plain EXPLAIN or a transaction you roll back, and escalate before touching production data.
